skillTree.localised_description: "It's a rabbit's foot. A rabbit. No… Oh never mind - it brings me luck. It does! Trust me!"
You'd better kill this one or they'll keep coming back until one of you is dead. Even then, there's no guarantee it'll be over!
"Don't be shy, reach in and grab something you like! Just errr.. Ignore the sticky bits."
Under the Quartermasters tender administrations, the Halfmast's bloaters strain at the front, swelling with anticipation for a quick release.

effects.description:
Attribute: Vanguard Deployment for Bloated Corpse units
	(Hero's army)

related_attributes.bullet_text: This unit can deploy outside the deployment zone.

skillTree.localised_description: Intense training under Seamus Tugg has made the Bloaters endure past the point of sense and reason. Just what that training is exactly no one dares to ask...

effects.description:
Barrier hit points: +500 for Bloated Corpse units
	(Hero's army)

Ward save: 10% for Bloated Corpse units
	(Hero's army)

skillTree.localised_description: They say that with every battle Quartermaster Tugg’s supply depot swells visibly, stretched out by every new coin, load, and gain.

effects.description: Magic item drop chance from battle: +25%

skillTree.localised_description: Quartermaster Tugg’s firm grip steadies his crew, keeping them fresh, hard to break, and longer lasting under pressure.
The crew's frames strain and bulge grotesquely, stretched wide to accommodate every incoming mend.
They lurch unseen through mire and shadow, their swollen eyes bulging with a voyeur’s desperate hunger until the moment of obscene release.

effects.description:
Attribute: Stalk & Unspottable for Bloated Corpse units
	(Hero's army)

related_attributes.bullet_text: This unit can move hidden in any terrain.
If this unit can hide at its current location it will not be spotted until the enemy is very close.

skillTree.localised_description: "Listen very carefully, me hearties, I shall say this only once… Quiet! Stromfels' stinkin' breath!"
"If all else fails, shoot it squarely and dive into the drink!"

effects.description: Ability number of uses: +1 for "More Powder!"

skillTree.localised_description: There is something to be said for whipping the foe into a frenzy before the fight is joined.
…because once they're in the water, you want your targets to stay there… forever.
You have to watch this one - when you shake their hand, count your fingers afterwards.
Death is always just a shot away.
"It's got a few secret ingredients. No, I won't tell you what they are, but the results will speak for themselves."
"Get more ammo up here, NOW!!!!!!!!"
"The recoil's a nightmare, but you can't deny the end result!"
A clever arrangement of lenses makes the target seem just that bit closer.
"I have been known to stretch things, because a cannon should feel full before it fires!"

effects.description:
Missile strength: +8% for Carronade, Mortar and Queen Bess units
	(Hero's army)

skillTree.localised_description: This champion extols discipline and fear away from the battlefield as much as on it.

effects.description: Training action: Unit experience gain is increased by an additional 10%
Training action: Unit experience gain is increased by an additional 20%
Training action: Unit experience gain is increased by an additional 30%

skillTree.localised_description: Such magic-users may be wise and able to offer sage advice, especially if they have scried the region.

effects.description: Boost Income action: Income is modified by an additional 2%
Boost Income action: Income is modified by an additional 4%
Boost Income action: Income is modified by an additional 6%

skillTree.localised_description: Oft-times, though you may have much, what you want the most is what your rivals have; such envy focuses the mind and creativity.

effects.description: Steal Technology action: Research rate is increased by an additional 3
Steal Technology action: Research rate is increased by an additional 6
Steal Technology action: Research rate is increased by an additional 10

skillTree.localised_description: Such a champion will not bend or break, but slay in their Lord's name.

effects.description: Wound action: Additional 5% chance of wounding target
Wound action: Additional 12% chance of wounding target
Wound action: Additional 21% chance of wounding target

skillTree.localised_description: To sow discord and confuse the enemy, sending them down the wrong route or befuddling their senses.

effects.description: Block Army action: Movement range is modified by an additional -3%
Block Army action: Movement range is modified by an additional -8%
Block Army action: Movement range is modified by an additional -15%

skillTree.localised_description: An expert in their craft, this Hero knows all the mistakes that can be made and how to best avoid making them.

attributes.bullet_text:
Undead units cannot be routed, but take damage when their Leadership is broken.
	
	Undead units also have:
	 Fear and Terror Immunity
	
	Undead units may also have their hit points restored by special characters such as the Vampire Counts Necromancer.
This unit frightens all enemy units, reducing their leadership when nearby. It is also immune to fear. Fear penalties do not stack.
This unit provides a leadership bonus to nearby allies. Units within range of both the Lord's aura and an encouraging unit will receive the larger of the two bonuses.
This unit can hide in forests until enemy units get too close.
When attacking braced charge defenders, this unit only loses half of its charge bonus

items.colour_text: "The Elixir of Damnation is one of the most potent and dangerous substances in Mallus, created by Dechala herself using an unholy blend of sacrificial blood, warpstone, and the vile fluids of her fornication."

None know what animates its creeping advance, whether drowned souls beneath the wheels, or some obscene tidial force that pushes from within. To march beside it is to hear the constant groan of iron under pressure, the promise of another release. Sailors in the Halfmast's crew laugh nervously, calling it “The Spitter,” for it never fails to spurt its briny payload at the worst possible moment, and always with devastating force.

ui_effects.localised_text: Explosion does not affect friendly troops

backgroundSkills.localised_description: "Wherever Seamus Tugg goes, a good pounding is sure to follow!"

effects.description:
Upkeep: -90% for Bloated Corpse units
	(Hero's army)

Speed: +15% for Bloated Corpse units
	(Hero's army)
